global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with engaging game elements and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging players to engage with friends in the game.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the entire background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: VoxelRealm logo
elements.description: A stylized logo for 'VoxelRealm' appears at the top left, featuring bold, modern typography against a white background.

elements.label: User-generated content icon
elements.description: A simple icon representing user-generated content, depicted as a square with a circular cutout in the center.

elements.label: Game interface screenshot
elements.description: A screenshot of the game interface showing a grid layout with empty squares, suggesting gameplay elements.

elements.label: Game interface screenshot
elements.description: Another screenshot of the game interface, similar to the previous one, showcasing additional gameplay elements.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: A small icon representing gameplay, featuring a circular shape with a subtle design.

elements.label: User-generated content icon
elements.description: A small icon similar to the previous one, representing user-generated content, located at the top left.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: Another small gameplay icon, positioned at the center, featuring a circular design.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: A small gameplay icon located at the top right, similar in design to the other gameplay icons.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A bold headline reading 'VoxelRealm UGC' at the top of the ad, designed to grab attention.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: A clear and inviting body text stating 'Beat your rivals Play with friends tonight' in a large, friendly font.
elements.text_content: Beat your rivals Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent call to action button labeled 'Claim reward' at the bottom, encouraging user interaction.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by gameplay icons, with body text centered and the CTA at the bottom.
